nightmare due to cold.def: Nightmare due to external cold factors, characterized by features of nightmare along with history of exposure of head to cold, during sleep

epilepsy.def: A morbid state usually characterized by paroxysmal transient loss of consciousness, seizures and frothing from mouth

mild epilepsy.unani: Ṣar‘ Khafīf / Al-Ṣar‘ al- Sahl/ Ṣar‘ Sahl
mild epilepsy.def: Mild epileptic episodes with brief loss of consciousness and quick response to treatment with sneezing agents and inhalations

severe epilepsy standard terminologies o.unani: Ṣar‘ Shadīd / Al-Ṣar‘ al- Ṣa‘b/ Ṣar‘ Mushkil
severe epilepsy standard terminologies o.def: Severe epileptic episodes with comparatively prolonged loss of consciousness, difficulty in breathing, prolonged convulsions and poor response to treatment with sneezing agents and inhalations Description

epilepsy due to abnormal- ity of brain.unani: Ṣar‘ Dimāghī / Ṣar‘ Aṣlī/ Ṣar‘ Dhātī
epilepsy due to abnormal- ity of brain.def: Epilepsy characterized by pain and heaviness in the head, lack of mental clarity and dizziness preceding the episode; this term does not cover Ṣar‘ Shirkī (epilepsy due to involvement of organs other than brain) mentione

sanguineous epilepsy.def: Epilepsy due to predominance of sanguine, accompanied by features of predominance of sanguine, e.g., redness of face and eyes, engorged vessels, large and swift pulse, lethargy, lack of mental clarity, excessive salivati

bilious epilepsy.def: Epilepsy due to predominance of yellow bile, characterized by brief episodes of mild seizures and accompanied with restlessness, mental confusion, yellowish discoloration of eyes and pale face

phlegmatic epilepsy.def: Epilepsy due to predominance of phlegm, characterized by excessive frothing from mouth, fluttering of eyebrows accompanied by thick salivation, flaccid face, whitish skin, bulky body, unequal and slow pulse and whitish u

melancholic epilepsy.def: Epilepsy due to predominance of black bile, accompanied by blackish discoloration of face, dryness of tongue and nostrils, restlessness, bad thoughts, delusion, palpitation and sleeplessness

epilepsy due to accumu- lation of gases.def: Epilepsy characterized by frequent episodes of mild seizures along with tinnitus, without heaviness of head Description

epilepsy due to the involvement of organ.def: Epilepsy caused by gases and vapours arising from specific organs and reaching the brain; this term does not cover Ṣar‘ Dimāghī (epilepsy due to abnormality of brain) mentioned under diseases

epilepsy due to gastric disorders.def: Epilepsy accompanied by loss of appetite, flatulence and gurgling in abdomen, preceded by severe headache, palpitation, fluttering at the cardiac end of stomach, nausea and pain in epigastric region, relieved by vomiting

epilepsy due to gastric disorders of phl.def: Epilepsy occurring with indigestion and general features of predominance of phlegm

epilepsy due to gastric disorders of mel.def: Epilepsy accompanied by constant hunger, sour taste in mouth, delusion and thoughtfulness

epilepsy due to gastric disorders of bil.def: Epilepsy accompanied by thirst and burning sensation in the epigastric region

epilepsy due to vapours arising from the.def: Epilepsy caused by vapours of bad quality arising from the whole body and reaching the brain

epilepsy due to involvement of heart.def: Epilepsy accompanied by any cardiac disease

epilepsy due to involvement of peritoneu.def: Epilepsy accompanied by sour belching, flatulence, painful gurgling in abdomen and burning sensation in peritoneum Description

epilepsy due to involve- ment of spleen.def: Epilepsy accompanied by pain, gurgling near site of spleen and hardening of spleen

epilepsy due to involve- ment of intesti.def: Epilepsy accompanied by sudden excretion of intestinal worms, excessive salivation especially before sleep, increased appetite and sensation of movements of worms during hunger along with abdominal pain

epilepsy due to involve- ment of uterus.def: Epilepsy associated with absence of menstruation and preceded by pain and heaviness in pelvic region, inguinal region and lower back

epilepsy due to involve- ment of extremi.def: Epilepsy preceded by feeling of cold, sensation of movement of ants from extremities towards brain, yawning and pandiculation, and characterized by blackish discoloration of face and open and wet eyes during seizures

epilepsy due to trauma.def: Epilepsy caused by trauma to the brain

epilepsy caused by scorprion / snake / w.def: Epilepsy caused by bites of snake, scorpion, wasps, etc.

infantile epilepsy.def: Childhood epilepsy, affecting children from birth to age of three or five years, characterized by muscular spasm, spasm of arms and legs and frothing from mouth

procursive epilepsy.def: Epilepsy induced or triggered by running / whirling Description

nocturnal epilepsy.def: Epilepsy with episodes occurring in the night or during sleep

diurnal epilepsy.def: Epilepsy with episodes occurring in daytime

unconsciousness.def: Unconsciousness due to obstruction of the ventricles of the brain and channels of pneuma; stoppage of motor and sensory functions of the body due to complete obstruction of the ventricles of the brain and channels of pne

sanguineous uncon- sciousness.def: Unconsciousness due to fullness of vessels of brain and channels of pneuma with sanguine, characterized by sudden loss of consciousness along with reddish or bluish face and eyes, engorged vessels of neck, forehead sweat

phlegmatic unconsciousness standard term.def: Unconsciousness due to obstruction by phlegmatic matter in ventricles of brain and channels of pneuma, characterized by sudden loss of consciousness along with whitish discoloration of skin, flaccidity of body, excessive

melancholic uncon- sciousness.def: Unconsciousness due to accumulation of thick melancholic matter in vessels of brain; a morbid state characterized by sudden loss of consciousness along with darkness of skin, palpitation and other features associated wit

unconsciousness due to head injury.def: A morbid state characterized by sudden loss of consciousness after traumatic brain injury

unconsciousness due to vapours of bad qu.def: A morbid state caused by vapours of bad quality of internal or external origin reaching the brain, characterized by sudden loss of consciousness

catalepsy.unani: Jumūd / Shukhūṣ/ Ākh- idha/Mudrika/ Qāṭūkhas/ Qūṭūkhas
catalepsy.def: A morbid state caused by obstructions produced in the hind brain, resulting in stoppage of all sensory functions and cessation of body movements; this term does not cover Al-Jumūd mentioned under signs and symptoms

mental weakness/ cerebrasthenia.def: Weakness of brain, caused by morbid temperament of brain, brain atrophy, excessive coitus, catarrh, sleeplessness and excessive evacuation

flaccidity.def: A morbid state characterized by loss of firmness of muscles leading to their weakness

apoplexy.def: General paralysis, characterized by paralysis of whole body except head and face Description

paralysis.def: Paralysis of body, which may be complete or partial, characterized by loss of muscle function in any part of the body; it may be complete or partial and may occur on one or both sides of the body; it may also occur in ju

phlegmatic paralysis.def: Hemiplegia due to obstruction of phlegmatic origin; characterized by paralysis of one side of body along with whitish discoloration of skin, flaccidity of body, excessive salivation and sleep and decreased thirst

sanguineous paralysis.def: Hemiplegia due to obstruction of sanguineous origin; a morbid state characterized by paralysis of one side of body along with increased body temperature, engorged vessels of neck and reddish face and eyes

paralysis due to crisis of any other dis.def: Hemiplegia due to crisis of any other disease; paralysis of one side of body associated with meningitis, epilepsy, unconsciousness, acute and chronic fevers, hysteria, etc.

inflammatory paralysis.def: Hemiplegia due to inflammation of spinal cord and nerves, characterized by gradual paralysis of one side of body along with fever and nerve pain

paralysis due to epidemic origin.def: Widespread occurrence of paralysis, usually affecting left side of body, due to putrfied air, characterized by bad breath, redness of eyes, irrelevant talk and unconsciousness

muscular spasm standard terminologies on.def: Involuntary contraction of muscles towards their origin Description

muscular spasm due to infiltration of ca.unani: Tashannuj Māddī / Tashannuj Raṭb/ Tashan- nuj Imtilā’ī
muscular spasm due to infiltration of ca.def: Sudden muscular spasm accompanied by specific features of causative matter

muscular spasm due to infiltration of ph.def: Muscular spasm accompanied by heaviness, flaccidity and coldness of affected part, excessive sleep and decreased thirst

muscular spasm due to infiltration of bl.def: Muscular spasm accompanied by decrease in size of affected part, increased appetite and other features of predominance of black bile

muscular spasm due to gases.def: Sudden muscular spasm which subsides quickly

muscular spasm due to dryness.unani: Tashannuj Yubsī / Tashannuj Istifrāghī/ Tashannuj Yābis
muscular spasm due to dryness.def: Muscular spasm occurring in a gradual manner after excessive evacuation, chronic fever, meningitis, starvation, heavy physical exertion, etc.

muscular spasm due to any irritant.def: Sudden muscular spasm preceded by severe pain of affected part, occurring after venomous bites and stings, worm infestation or diseases of stomach, urinary bladder and uterus

muscular spasm of children.def: Muscular spasm occurring in children below seven years of age accompanied by continuous high-grade fever, sleeplessness, pale skin, blackish tongue and decreased salivation

stretching of muscles.def: Stretching of muscles leading to straightening of organ; a disease characterized by stretching at both ends of muscles of an organ, which may lead to its straightening Description

tetany.def: Sustained contraction of muscles, characterized by sustained contraction of muscles of neck or the whole body

tetany due to repletion.def: Sustained contraction of muscles due to repletion of phlegm in nerves and muscles

tetany due to dryness.def: Sustained contraction of muscles due to predominance of dryness in nerves and muscles

emprosthotonus.def: Sustained contraction of muscles of anterior part of body resulting in its forward bending

opisthotonus.def: Sustained contraction of muscles of posterior part of body resulting in its backward bending

generalized contraction of muscles.def: Sustained contraction of muscles of the whole body resulting in its straightening

facial palsy.def: Deviation of one side of face, caused either by flaccidity of muscles of face and eyelid or their spasm leading to deviation of one side of face towards opposite side and non-closure of eyes and lips on the affected side

flacid facial palsy.def: A type of deviation of one side of face due to flaccidity of muscles, characterized by difficulty in speaking, drooping of eyelid, lack of mental clarity and distaste in mouth

spastic facial palsy standard terminolog.def: A type of deviation of one side of face due to spasm of muscles, characterized by stretched skin of forehead of affected side, rigidity of facial muscles, inability to close eyes of unaffected side and decreased salivati

tremor.def: Tremor due to emotional factors, weakness of motor faculty, weakness of affected organ, or old age

tremor due to cold morbid temperament.def: Tremor due to simple cold morbid temperament, moistness and phlegmatic obstructions of affected nerve

tremor due to excessive liquor intake.def: Tremor caused by excessive liquor intake

tremor due to excessive sexual intercour.def: Tremor caused by excessive indulgence in sexual intercourse

momentary shaking of organs.def: A disease characterized by momentary shaking of organs irrespective of sleep or wakefulness; this term does not cover Ikhtilāj (momentary fluttering of muscles) mentioned under diseases

momentary shaking of organs due to predo.def: A disease caused by predominance of moistness on the brain and characterized by gradual increase in severity, longer intervals between two episodes and occurrence during the early phase of sleep

momentary shaking of organs due to liquo.def: A disease caused by prolonged liquor intake and characterized by sudden appearance of clinical features

numbness.def: Complete or partial loss of sensation of any organ of the body

sanguineous numbness.def: Complete or partial loss of sensation of any organ of the body accompanied by redness of face and eyes, engorgement of vessels, heaviness in the body and increased sleep Description

bilious numbness.def: Complete or partial loss of sensation of any organ of the body, accompanied by other features of predominance of yellow bile

phlegmatic numbness.def: Complete or partial loss of sensation of any organ of the body, accompanied by lethargy, whitish discoloration of skin and diminished mental clarity

melancholic numbness.def: Complete or partial loss of sensation of any organ of the body accompanied with features of predominance of black bile

gaseous numbness.def: Complete or partial loss of sensation of any organ of the body accompanied with features of predominance of gases

numbness due to dryness.def: Complete or partial loss of sensation of any organ of the body due to excessive dryness

fasciculation diseases of the eye.def: Momentary fluttering of muscles; momentary involuntary movements occurring in the muscles of some organs usually due to thick gases

conjunctivitis standard terminologies on.def: Inflammation of conjunctiva, caused by predominance of humours and gases and characterized by redness, swelling and pain Description

sanguineous conjunctivitis.def: A type of acute inflammation of counjunctiva due to predominance of sanguine, characterized by redness of eyes, swelling, purulent discharge, engorgement of vessels of eyes and temporal region and pulsation at temporal r

bilious conjunctivitis.def: A type of acute inflammation of counjunctiva due to predominance of yellow bile, characterized by severe pain, burning, pricking sensation, redness, tension, decreased lacrimation and discharge

phlegmatic conjunctivitis.def: A type of chronic inflammation of counjunctiva due to predominance of phlegm, characterized by heaviness, lesser degree of redness, lacrimation, excessive discharge and sticky eyes

melancholic conjunctivitis.def: A type of chronic inflammation of counjunctiva due to predominance of black bile, characterized by heaviness, dryness, pricking sensation, headache, etc.

gaseous conjunctivitis.def: A type of conjunctivitis characterized by feeling of distension in the eyes without heaviness, lacrimation and stickiness of eyelids

false conjunctivitis.unani: Ramad Ghayr Ḥaqīqī / Takaddur Ṭabaqa al-Multaḥima
false conjunctivitis.def: Mild redness in eyes, characterized by mild redness, mild burning sensation and lacrimation

severe conjunctivitis.def: Inflammation of conjunctiva characterized by extreme redness and hindrance in closure of eyes at times Description

eruption or nodules on conjunctiva.def: A disease caused by accumulation of thick phlegm or sanguine in conjunctiva, characterized by appearance of hard white or red nodules on inner canthus, outer canthus, below eyelids or around cornea in a beaded manner

puffiness/swelling of conjunctiva.def: Distension of conjunctiva, caused by penetration of causative matter within spaces of conjunctiva

gaseous puffiness/ swelling of conjuncti.def: A type of sudden distension of conjunctiva without heaviness, due to gases

puffiness/swelling of conjunctiva due to.def: Distension of conjunctiva caused by fluid and characterized by heaviness in eyes without pain and itching and persistence of indentation for short duration

phlegmatic puffiness/ swelling of conjun.def: Phlegmatic distension of conjunctiva; a type of gradual distension caused by phlegm and characterized by heaviness in eyes and persistence of indentation for longer duration

melancholic puffiness/ swelling of conju.def: Melancholic distension of conjunctiva caused by black bile and characterized by severity of distension along with hardness and blackishness of affected part

conjunctival eruptions standard terminol.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of red eruptions on the conjunctiva, throbbing pain and lacrimation Description

hardness of the conjunctiva.def: A disease characterized by foreign body sensation, mild redness of conjunctiva, mild pain, and difficult eye movement, especially after waking up

subconjunctival haemorrhage.def: Red, bluish or blackish spot on the bulbar conjunctiva due to rupture of vessels of eye

pannus.def: Covering on surface of conjunctiva, characterized by appearance of a thin white covering on the surface of conjunctiva due to dilatation of vessels

covering on surface of conjunctiva along.def: Appearance of covering on the surface of conjunctiva along with wet eyes and lacrimation
Appearance of covering on the surface of conjunctiva without lacrimation

thicker covering on surface of conjuncti.def: Appearance of thick covering, which conceals the cornea and causes complete loss of vision

blurry vision.def: A morbid state characterized by hazy appearance of objects due to accumulation of melancholic vapours on the area of vision

corneal opacity.def: A disease in which cornea becomes white and opaque, usually due to its scarring

pterygium.def: Growth originating from inner canthus, which can extend either up to the margin of cornea or the cornea as a whole Description

growth at the inner canthus.def: Abnormal growth at the inner canthus, often covering the duct of lacrimal gland and preventing passage of tears

ophthalmic ulcers.def: Ulcers of eye; ulcers of different layers of eye, which are caused by pouring of sharp and burnt humours

conjunctival ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of a red spot on conjunctiva along with severe piercing pain and excessive lacrimation

ulcers of iris.def: A morbid state characterized by a red spot behind the cornea with prominent arteries, severe piercing pain and excessive lacrimation

corneal ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of white spot on the cornea along with severe piercing pain and excessive lacrimation

superficial corneal ulcers.def: Ulcers occurring in superficial layers of cornea

diffuse cloudy corneal ulcer.def: A type of superficial ulcer of cornea which appears as a cloudy, grey area on whole of cornea

localized cloudy corneal ulcer.def: A type of superficial ulcer of cornea which appears cloudy but covers small portion of it

marginal corneal ulcer standard terminol.def: A type of superficial ulcer of cornea which occurs at its margin Description

cotton-like corneal ulcer.def: A type of superficial ulcer of cornea which appears as a small piece of cotton

deep corneal ulcers.def: Ulcers occurring in deep layers of cornea

clean deep corneal ulcer.def: Ulcer covering small part of deeper layers of cornea and found with scar tissue

minimally deep corneal ulcer.def: Ulcer covering larger part of deeper layers of cornea

unclean deep corneal ulcer.def: Ulcer found in deep layers of cornea with scar tissue

web-like ulcers of eye.def: Ulcers often appearing in cornea and other layers of eyes with vessels spreading like a web

prolapse of iris.def: Prolapse of iris resembling head of ant due to rupture of cornea as a result of corneal ulcers

iris prolapse similar to house fly’s hea.def: Prolapse of iris resembling head of house fly due to rupture of cornea as a result of corneal ulcers

iris prolapse similar to grape.def: Prolapse of iris resembling grape due to rupture of cornea as a result of corneal ulcers

iris prolapse similar to small apple.def: Prolapse of iris reaching up to eyelid and causing hindrance in closing the eye

iris prolapse similar to flattened head.def: Chronic total prolapse of iris and its attachment to ulcerated margins of cornea Description

bulging cornea.def: Protrusion of cornea above the conjunctiva due to accumulation of gaseous matter below it

corneal abscess.def: Large and deep-seated ulcer covering whole cornea, caused by external factors or internal sharp and corrosive humours

corneal eruptions.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of white eruptions on the cornea, throbbing pain and lacrimation

corneal cancer.def: Cancer occupying most of the cornea caused by the infiltration of bad quality black bile and characterized by accumulation of thick pus on cornea with redness of vessels surrounding the cornea and severe pain, especially

cloudy cornea.def: A morbid state due to accumulation of infiltrated thick fluids on the cornea and characterized by cloudy cornea, diminished vision, wet eyes and continuous nasal discharge

dryness of cornea.def: Shrinkage of cornea leading to diminished vision and dry eye

pus behind cornea.def: Accumulation of pus below the cornea in small or large amount

lacrimal cyst standard terminologies on.def: Chronic swelling of the inner canthus; chronic inflammation of the inner canthus is caused by rupture of abscess or pustules leading to the formation of fistula and flow of tears continuously Description

unruptured lacrimal cyst.def: Small cyst-like swelling appearing between inner canthus and nose caused by flow of morbid matter to the site

ruptured lacrimal cyst.def: A depression in the inner canthus of eye filled with pus caused by putrefaction of humour within it

greenish discoloration of eye.def: Change in colour of eyes due to external factors, venesection of vessels of canthus, etc.

bluish discoloration of eye.def: Condition in which eyes become bluish in colour due to excess of vitreous humour or inflammatory conditions of layers of eyes

depigmentation of eye.def: Blue discoloration of eye due to morbid temperament of iris

cataract.def: Opacity of lens of eye, in which patient initially feels disturbance in vision, e.g., seeing of objects like fly, hair, etc.

immature cataract resembling blackish cl.def: A type of immature cataract characterized by presence of immovable cloudy fluid behind the pupil

immature cataract resembling mercury.def: A type of immature cataract characterized by presence of round-shaped material behind pupil which moves like mercury in sunlight Description

immature cataract resemb- ling a piece o.def: A type of immature cataract characterized by presence of piece of limestone-like material behind pupil

immature cataract resemb- ling sky colou.def: A type of immature cataract characterized by presence of sky-blue material behind pupil

diffuse immature cataract.def: A type of immature cataract that becomes dense in later stages

exophthalmos.def: Eyeball protrusion due to distension and accumulation of gases or humours, etc.

congestive protrusion of eyeball.def: Protrusion of eyeball due to accumulation of any material within it

congestive protrusion of eyeball due to.def: Protrusion of eyeball due to accumulation of humours within it, characterized by heaviness
Protrusion of eyeball due to accumulation of gases within it, characterized by absence of heaviness

protrusion of eyeball due to compression.def: Protrusion of eyeball due to pressure from outside, e.g., severe headache, during shouting, vomiting and parturition, etc.

protrusion of eyeball due to structural.def: Protrusion of eyeball due to paresis of eye muscles and ligaments

phthisis bulbi.def: Shrinkage of eye caused by reduction in the quantity of its fluid content

blindness standard terminologies on unan.def: A morbid state characterized by inability to see Description

poor eyesight.def: A morbid state characterized by decreased ability to see

myopia.def: Shortsightedness; a disease in which patient can see nearer objects but faraway objects appear blurred

hypermetropia.def: Longsightedness; a disease in which patient can see faraway objects but nearer objects appear blurred

visual hallucinations.def: False perception of images, such as pillars of smoke, sparkles, white objects, objects bigger than their size, objects smaller than their size, multiple objects or objects falling down

night blindness.def: A disease characterized by inability to see well at night or in poor light; this term does not cover Imtinā‘ al-Ibṣār fi’l Layl mentioned under signs and symptoms

day blindness.def: A disease characterized by inability to see well in daylight; this term does not cover Imtinā‘ al-Ibṣār fi’l Nahār mentioned under signs and symptoms

glare.def: A disease in which the patient finds it difficult to see clearly in daylight and can not tolerate sunlight

snow blindness.def: Temporary loss of vision due to overexposure to bright objects and ice Description

blurring of vision due to long stay in d.unani: Dhahāb al-Baṣar fi’l Maṭāmīr wa’l Ḥubūs al-Muẓlima
blurring of vision due to long stay in d.def: A condition which occurs when a person staying in the dark for a relatively long period is suddenly exposed to sunlight

squint.def: A disease in which one eye turns inwards towards nose while the other one turns laterally

blepharoptosis.def: Drooping of upper eyelid due to loosening of muscles responsible for its elevation

ankyloblepharon.unani: Iltiṣāq al-Jafn / Iltiṣāq al- Ajfān/Iltiṣāq al-Jafnayn
ankyloblepharon.def: Adhesion of eyelids to each other

adhesion of eyelid with cornea.def: Disease occurring as a result of chronic ulcer or incorrect surgical procedure

symblepharon.def: Adhesion of eyelid to conjunctiva, due to chronic ulcer or incorrect surgical procedure

stricture of eyelids.def: Stricture of one or both eyelids or stricture of upper eyelid with aversion of lower eyelid hindering complete closure of eyes

ectropion standard terminologies on unan.unani: Shatra Khārijiyya / In- qilāb al-Jafn al-Asfal

eyelid hardening.def: A disease characterized by difficulty in opening and closing the eyes, pain and redness

eyelid thickening.def: A disease characterized by thickening of upper eyelid

blepharitis.def: Inflammation of eyelid margins; a disease marked by thickening of eyelid and ulceration at the margins accompanied by redness

stye.def: Hard swelling of eyelid, characterized by hard and barley-shaped swelling at margin of eyelid

soft stye.def: Soft swelling of eyelid, characterized by soft, red,barley-shaped swelling at margin of eyelid

tick infestation of eyelids.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of ticks at root of eyelids

louse infestation of eyelids.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of lice at root of eyelids

abscess of eyelid.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of a small swelling on the central part or sides of external surface of eyelid

reddish swelling on eyelid.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of reddish swelling similar to insect bite on the external surface of eyelid after itching

cracking of margins of eyelid.def: A morbid state characterized by cracking of margins of eyelid accompanied by redness, severe burning sensation and small eruptions Description

wart of eyelid.def: A morbid state caused by accumulation of melancholic humour in the eyelid and characterized by appearance of hard swelling on external surface of eyelid

cyst of eyelid.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of swelling of cystic nature on external surface of eyelid

ulcers of eyelid.def: A disease characterized by appearance of small ulcers near roots of eyelashes and dandruff-like scales between the roots

erosive ulcers of eyelid.def: A disease characterized by appearance of erosive spreading ulcers on the eyelid

roughness of eyelid.def: A disease characterized by roughness of inner surface of eyelid after itching along with redness and lacrimation

itching of eyelids and canthi.def: A disease occurring due to accumulation of saline humours which may lead to ulceration and itching

blue and green discolor- ation of eyelid.def: A morbid state occurring after trauma or severe vomiting

excessive blinking of eyes standard term.def: A disease caused by foreign body in eye or accumulation of thick gases in the eyelids and characterized by excessive blinking; this term does not cover Sur‘a al-Ṭarf mentioned under signs and symptoms Description

hard swelling of inner surface of eyelid.def: Stony swelling of inner surface of eyelid, characterized by presence of small stony hard swelling at inner surface of eyelid

ulcer/erosion of eyelid.def: A disease characterized by presence of ulcer/ erosion on outer surface of eyelid

tearing of eyelid.def: A disease characterized by presence of ulcers on outer surface of eyelid

oedema of eyelids.def: A disease occurring due to accumulation of material of thin consistency, vapours and gases

twitching of eyelid.def: A disease occurring due to accumulation of gaseous matter or emotions such as grief, anger and joy

itchy granulation of eyelids.def: A disease characterized by roughness and redness of inner surface of eyelids, itching, pain, heaviness and small hard eruptions

itchy diffused granulation of eyelids.def: A disease characterized by slight roughness and redness of inner surface of eyelid and continuous lacrimation

itchy granulation of eye- lids with erup.def: A disease characterized by presence of eruptions similar to prickly heat with white tips on the inner surface of eyelids along with desquamation

itchy granulation of eyelids with erupti.def: A disease characterized by severe pain and presence of eruptions embedded in inner surface of eyelids which are similar to fig with round base and sharp tip Description

itchy granulation of eye- lids with erup.def: Itchy granulation of eyelids with eruptions similar to black lentil, characterized by presence of black-coloured eruptions similar to black lentil on the inner surface of eyelids and ulcers with crusts

lipoma of upper eyelid.def: A disease characterized by presence of fatty immovable swelling on the outer surface of upper eyelid leading to difficulty in its lifting

chalazion.def: A disease characterized by presence of whitish hard and round growth on outer surface of upper eyelid

nodule of upper eyelid.def: A disease characterized by presence of hard nodule on the upper eyelid

mulberry-shaped growth of eyelids.def: A disease characterized by presence of soft mulberry-shaped growth on inner surface of upper eyelid, itching and burning sensation

trichiasis.def: A disease characterized by inversion of eyelashes causing continuous irritation of the eyeball, leading to redness, itching and lacrimation

distichiasis.def: A disease characterized by abnormal growth of lashes from the internal edge of eyelids

greying of eyelashes ptilosis standard t.def: A condition which occurs due to viscous humour A disease characterized by falling out of eyelashes Description

sticking of eyelids to each other.def: A condition which usually occurs with conjunctivitis

frequent flow of tears.def: A disease characterized by flow of a few drops of tears at frequent intervals

foreign body in eye diseases of ear, nos.def: Foreign body, e.g., dust, insect, etc., that comes in contact with eye and causes irritation and lacrimation

otalgia.def: Earache / pain in ear; a disease characterized by pain in ear with its origin in inner, middle, or external ear due to hot or cold morbid temperament, inflammation, pustules, etc.

infantile earache.def: Child earache; a disease characterized by pain in the ear, continuous crying, restlessness and rubbing the ear

partial hearing loss.def: A disease characterized by partial loss of ability to hear

deafness.def: A disease characterized by complete loss of ability to hear

congenital atresia of the external audit.def: A condition in which patient has no external ear opening Description

tinnitus due to phlegm.def: A disease characterized by perception of high-pitched sound in the ears and heaviness in ears and head

tinnitus due to gases.def: A disease characterized by perception of high pitched sound in ears which seems to shift its place during movement

tinnitus due to decreased function of he.def: A disease characterized by perception of high-pitched sound in the ears along with general weakness

tinnitus due to increased sensitivity.def: A disease characterized by perception of high-pitched sound in ears which subsides after taking intoxicants

tinnitus due to dryness.def: A disease characterized by perception of high-pitched sound in ears which intensifies during hunger and subsides after eating

ear bleeding aural myiasis standard term.unani: Infijār al-Dam mina’l Udhun Dūd al-Udhun
ear bleeding aural myiasis standard term.def: A disease characterized by bleeding from the ear, which may occur in the critical phase of some diseases or due to trauma or congestion and rupture of blood vessels A disease characterized by presence of maggots in the e

otorrhoea.def: A disease characterized by discharge of pus from ear

pruritus of ear.def: A disease characterized by an itching sensation in the ear

ear cartilage fracture.def: Fracture of the cartilage of ear due to trauma or injury

avulsion of ear.def: A morbid state characterized by detachment of the pinna

fissures of external ear.def: A disease characterized by cracks at the junction of external ear and skull

hyperacusis.def: Noise sensitivity; a disease characterized by intolerance to loud sounds

ear obstruction.def: A disease caused by wax, coagulated blood, growth or foreign body and characterized by feeling of fullness in the affected ear

eruptions of ear canal.def: A disease characterized by eruptions in the ear canal and pain

ulcers of ear.def: A disease caused by rupture of eruptions and characterized by ulcers with discharge of pus

erosive ulcer of ear.def: A disease caused by acrid and corrosive matter of bad quality and characterized by deep ulcers and exudation Description

foreign body in ear.def: A morbid condition characterized by the presence of foreign body in the ear canal

parotitis.def: A morbid condition characterized by inflammation of glands located below and in front of ear canal

sanguineous parotitis.def: A type of acute infammation of parotid gland due to predominance of sanguine, characterized by swelling, pain and redness over the parotid gland along with intense heaviness and distension of the parotid gland

bilious parotitis.def: A type of acute infammation of parotid gland due to predominance of yellow bile, characterized by moderate swelling and pain with burning sensation along with moderate heaviness and distension of the parotid gland

phlegmatic parotitis.def: A type of chronic infammation of parotid gland due to predominance of phlegm, characterized by soft swelling, pain and mild redness of affected part

melancholic parotitis.def: A type of chronic infammation of parotid gland due to predominance of black bile, characterized by hard swelling and mild pain

coryza catarrh standard terminologies on.def: A disease characterized by flow of catarrhal fluids from the brain towards nose A disease characterized by flow of catarrhal fluids from the brain towards throat and chest Description

hot/acute coryza and catarrh.def: Coryza and catarrh due to excessive heat; a disease characterized by nasal discharge of thin consistency, nasal irritation with burning sensation, increased temperature of scalp and red eyes

sanguineous coryza.def: An acute disease characterized by pinkish nasal discharge, irritation in gums, uvula and ear, red eyes and sweet taste in mouth

bilious coryza.def: An acute disease characterized by thin yellowish nasal discharge, headache, excessive thirst, burning sensation in head and eyes, bitter taste in mouth and lacrimation

cold/chronic coryza and catarrh.def: Coryza and catarrh due to excessive cold; a chronic disease characterized by stuffy nose, nasal twang and nasal discharge

phlegmatic coryza.def: A chronic disease characterized by confusion, heaviness in the head with excessive salivation, decreased taste, heaviness of tongue and difficulty in speaking

melancholic coryza.def: A chronic disease characterized by dryness of eyes along with headache and heaviness in head and rotten smell in nose

parosmia.def: Distortion of the sense of smell; a disease characterized by smelling of only one kind of odour, smelling of different odours at a time, smelling of fragrances only and not of bad odours, or smelling of only bad odours a

eruptions of nose.def: A disease characterized by presence of papules in the nasal cavity which become hard in later stages

nasal ulcers.def: A disease characterized by ulcers in nasal cavity with discharge of pus

dry nasal ulcer.def: A morbid state characterized by ulcers in nasal cavity with crusting

moist nasal ulcer.def: A morbid state characterized by ulcers in nasal cavity with discharge of pus and exudation and absence of crusts

foul-smelling nasal ulcer.def: An ulcer in the nasal cavity which causes foul-smelling discharge from the nose

nasal polyps.def: Abnormal growth projecting from lining of nasal passage

sanguineous nasal polyps phlegmatic nasa.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of reddish, slightly hard and painful growth projecting from lining of nasal passage A morbid state characterized by presence of whitish, soft and painless growth projecting from

melancholic nasal polyps.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of dark-coloured hard growth projecting from lining of nasal passage; this term does not cover Saraṭan-i-Anf (nasal cancer)/Urbiyān al-Anf (shrimp-shaped nasal growth) mentioned u

shrimp-shaped nasal growth.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of soft large abnormal growth in nasal passage with prominent surrounding vessels, developing into exuding ulcer at later stage; this term does not cover Bawāsīr-i-Anf (nasal poly

nasal cancer.def: A morbid state usually occurring after melancholic disorders of brain, characterized by presence of small hard growth in nasal cavity which becomes larger in later stages, pain and nasal deformity; this term does not cov

burning sensation in nose.def: A morbid state caused by hot morbid temperament of nose

nasal myiasis.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of maggots in nasal cavity and itching sensation in frontal part of the head

nasal irritation.def: A morbid state characterized by burning sensation and irritation in nasal passage during inhalation of cold air, with mild watering eyes

bad odour from nose.def: A morbid state caused by putrefied nasal polyps and chronic ulcers Description

crushing of nose.def: A morbid state caused by trauma

epistaxis.def: A morbid state characterized by bleeding from nose due to external and internal factors

excessive sneezing.def: A morbid state caused by nasal irritation due to external factors such as dust, smoke, pungent odour, etc., or internal factors such as abnormal heat of brain resulting in irritating secretions

dryness of nose.def: A morbid state caused by intense heat and characterized by dryness in the body and dried viscous secretion in nostrils

nasal obstruction.def: A morbid state caused by viscous secretion and abnormal growth in the nostrils and characterized by nasal twang and tinnitus

hypernasal speech.def: A morbid state characterized by nasal twang and voice

morbid temperament of lip.def: An abnormal change in temperament of lip, which may be hot, cold, moist or dry

hot morbid temperament of lip.def: A morbid state characterized by increased temperature of affected part, burning sensation in lips and relief by cold air and water

cold morbid temperament of lip.def: A morbid state characterized by bluish discoloration and decreased sensation of lips when exposed to cold environment

moist morbid temperament of lip standard.def: A morbid state characterized by sagging lips Description

dry morbid temperament of lip.def: A morbid state characterized by dry, cracked and peeling lips

cheilitis.def: Inflammation of the lips; a disease caused by predominance of any of the four humours or insect bite

sanguineous cheilitis.def: A disease characterized by increased redness of lips along with other features of inflammation

bilious cheilitis.def: A disease characterized by yellowish-red lip along with itching and burning sensation

phlegmatic cheilitis.def: A disease characterized by whitish, cold and soft lip along with mild pain

melancholic cheilitis.def: A disease characterized by hard and bluish lip along with pain

angular cheilitis.def: A disease characterized by skin breakdown and whitish or greenish discoloration of corners of mouth

eruptions on lip.def: A disease caused by predominance of sanguine, yellow bile or black bile, increased heat of stomach and its vapours

labial ulcer.def: Ucers of lip; a disease caused by rupture of pustular eruptions and swellings

labial polyp.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of bluish grape- or mulberry-shaped growth on lower lip with its eversion Description

pale lips.def: A morbid state characterized by whitening of lips due to abnormality of sanguine

lip twitching.def: A morbid state characterized by fluttering of lips

scaling of lips.def: A morbid state characterized by whitening of lips along with formation of thin scales

cracked lips.def: A morbid state characterized by cracking of lips due to dryness

lip contracture.def: A morbid state which may be congenital or acquired

glossitis.def: Inflammation of tongue which may sanguineous, bilious, phlegmatic or melancholic

sanguineous glossitis.def: A morbid state characterized by swollen tongue, severe pain with pulsation and excessive salivation

bilious glossitis.def: A morbid state characterized by swollen tongue, severe pain with burning sensation and dry tongue

phlegmatic glossitis.def: A morbid state characterized by swollen tongue, mild pain and excessive salivation

melancholic glossitis standard terminolo.def: A morbid state characterized by swollen tongue, pain and hard and dry tongue Description

burning sensation in tongue.def: A disease caused by heat of brain and cardiac end of stomach and eating of bitter and salty or sweet diet

itchy tongue.def: A morbid state characterized by increased redness of tongue and relief on rinsing the mouth with lukewarm water

desquamation of tongue.def: A morbid state characterized by peeling of surface of tongue

tongue atony.def: A morbid state characterized by flaccidity of tongue, increased salivation and difficult speech

macroglossia.def: A morbid state characterized by unusually large tongue

tongue tie.def: A morbid state in which abnormally short lingual frenulum connects tip of tongue to floor of mouth and hinders its normal movement

ranula.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of hard growth on base of tongue, resulting in difficulty in speaking

fissured tongue.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of cracks on surface of tongue, causing irritation while eating

tongue spasm.def: A morbid state caused by viscous secretion, acute disease conditions and black bile, characterized by difficulty in speaking

ageusia.def: A morbid state caused by accumulation of fluids in nerves supplying tongue and characterized by complete loss of sense of taste and inability to differentiate between hot and cold and between sweet and sour taste

dysgeusia/ parageusia.def: A morbid state characterized by altered sensation of taste

mouth ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of spreading ulcers on external surface of mouth and tongue

sanguineous mouth ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of reddish ulcers on external surface of mouth and tongue

bilious mouth ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of yellowish ulcers on external surface of mouth and tongue and burning sensation

phlegmatic mouth ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of whitish ulcers on external surface of mouth and tongue

melancholic mouth ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of blackish ulcers on external surface of mouth and tongue

mouth ulcers of babies standard terminol.def: A type of stomatitis occurring in babies, caused by indigestion due to poor quality of milk Description

deep ulcers of mouth.def: A morbid state characterized by appearance of fetid, deep and spreading ulcers in oral cavity

eruptions of oral cavity.def: A morbid state caused by increased heat in area surrounding stomach and head

halitosis.def: A morbid state characterized by foul smell from the mouth

palatitis.def: Inflammation of palate; a morbid state characterized by pain and redness of the affected part

choking.def: Inflammation of muscles of larynx; a morbid state characterized by pain in throat, difficulty in swallowing and breathing, and bulging of eyes
A type of asphyxia caused by obstruction within air passages. It is usually accidental. Its possible English equivalent is choking.

inflammation of external laryngeal muscl.def: A morbid state characterized by difficulty in breathing and swallowing

inflammation of internal laryngeal muscl.def: A morbid state characterized by open mouth, protruded tongue, severe restlessness, difficult breathing and difficult movement of head and neck

inflammation of muscles of larynx due to.def: A morbid state characterized by fever, severe pain in throat with pulsation, severe difficulty in breathing, prominent vessels of neck and head, redness of face, eyes and tongue and sweet taste Description

A morbid state characterized by fever, severe piercing pain in throat with burning sensation, yellowish discoloration of tongue, bitter taste, intense thirst, dryness of mouth, restlessness and sleeplessness
A morbid state characterized by moderate pain, tightness in throat, whitish tongue, salty or sour taste and puffiness of eyelids and face
A morbid state characterized by distension in affected area, dryness of palate and tongue and blackish discoloration of swollen area and face

acute inflammation of muscles of fauces.def: A morbid state characterized by pain in throat, difficulty in swallowing with nasal regurgitation, difficulty in breathing, bulged eyes, loss of voice, excessive salivation and appearance of necklace-shaped redness from

inflammation involving tonsils and other.def: A morbid state characterized by difficulty in breathing and appearance of inflammation from root of ear to neck bilaterally

uvulitis.def: A morbid state characterized by swollen uvula and pain

inflammation of root of uvula standard t.def: A morbid state characterized by inflammation at base of uvula Description

sanguineous uvulitis.def: A morbid state characterized by redness and swelling of uvula with mild pain and burning sensation

bilious uvulitis.def: A morbid state characterized by moderate piercing pain, severe burning sensation, intense thirst and dry mouth

phlegmatic uvulitis.def: A morbid state characterized by negligible pain and soft and whitish swelling

melancholic uvulitis.def: A morbid state characterized by pain and hard and blackish swelling

catarrhal uvulitis.def: A morbid state caused by pouring of catarrhal secretions from head on uvula

uvuloptosis.def: Relaxation of uvula; a morbid state characterized by elongation of uvula due to flaccidity

tonsillitis.def: Inflammation of tonsils caused by the abnormality of any of the four humours

flaccidity of laryngeal muscles.def: A morbid state characterized by stoppage of movement of larynx

voice disorders.def: A morbid state characterized by aphonia or abnormal quality, pitch or volume of voice

hoarseness of voice.def: A morbid state characterized by harsh and husky voice Description

inability to speak due to respiratory di.def: A morbid state characterized by inability of patient to complete a sentence without taking break due to respiratory distress

tremulous voice.def: A morbid state caused by predominance of coldness or spasm of laryngeal muscles, excessive crying, shouting, cutting of uvula and sleeplessness

inability to speak loudly.def: A morbid state usually caused by abnormality of larynx and vocal cords

low-pitched voice.def: A morbid state caused by disturbed functioning of vocal cords due to excessive shouting

rumbling voice.def: A morbid state caused by accumulation of thick secretions in larynx and trachea

trembling voice.def: A morbid state caused by accumulation of phlegmatic matter in larynx

pain in throat.def: A morbid state caused by any inflammatory condition of throat or due to morbid temperament

eruptions in throat standard terminologi.def: A morbid state characterized by pain, burning sensation, continuous dry cough and change in voice quality Description

throat ulcer.def: A morbid state caused by rupture of eruptions occurring in throat due to sanguineous or bilious matter

burning sensation in the throat.def: A morbid state caused by sanguine or yellow bile

feeling of roughness in throat.def: A morbid state caused by pouring of catarrhal secretion on throat, black bile, environmental pollution or excessive shouting

pain in throat due to spasm.def: Severe pain in throat due to spasm of surrounding organs

food bolus impaction.def: A morbid state caused by sticking of food material in throat leading to choking

liquid aspiration.def: A morbid state caused by sucking of liquid into larynx and trachea

needle ingestion.def: A morbid state caused by accidental swallowing of needle

sticking of leech or sticking of bone of.unani: Tashabbuth al-‘Alaq wa’l Shawk fi’l Ḥalq
sticking of leech or sticking of bone of.def: A morbid state characterized by pain and irritation in the throat, restlessness and presence of blood in saliva

gingivitis.def: Inflammation of gums accompanied by pain and redness Description

bleeding gums/ scurvy.def: Bleeding gums caused by weakness of nutritive faculty of gums or excess of blood in the body

gingival ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of simple or putrefied ulcers on gums

perforating ulcers of gums.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of oozing putrefied chronic ulcer that penetrates gums

loose gums.def: Flaccidity of gums; a morbid state characterized by spongy gums

hard growth on gums.def: A morbid state occurring in the gums at the back of the mouth as a result of incomplete resolution of any previous swelling

irritation of gums.def: A morbid state usually occurring in children during teething, characterized by irritation and itching of gums

dental plaque.def: A morbid state characterized by deposition of yellowish, greenish or blackish plaques at roots of teeth

odontalgia.def: Toothache; a morbid state caused by inflammation of gums, simple or organic morbid temperament and dental caries

enlargement of tooth.def: Increase in size of tooth with or without pain

discoloration of teeth standard terminol.def: A morbid state caused by penetration of putrid humours in teeth leading to their discoloration Description

odontoprisis.def: Grinding of teeth; a morbid state usually occurring in children during sleep due to weakness of jaw muscles

odontoseisis.def: Looseness of teeth, caused by loosening of tooth sockets

teeth falling.def: A morbid state caused by trauma, anaemia, old age, etc.

dental caries.def: A morbid state caused by accumulation and putrefaction of bad quality secretions leading to decay and discoloration of teeth

breaking down of teeth into smaller piec.def: A morbid state caused either by predominance of moistness or extreme dryness in teeth

breaking down of teeth into large pieces.def: A morbid state caused either by predominance of moistness or extreme dryness in teeth

formation of dental cavities.def: A morbid state caused by accumulation and putrefaction of bad quality secretions leading to formation of dental cavities

dental irritation.def: A morbid state caused by drinking of bad quality water or intake of foods, producing sharp humours that get accumulated in roots of teeth

insensitivity of teeth.def: A morbid state characterized by loss of sensation of teeth due to chewing of sour and astringent things Description

hypersensitivity of teeth.def: A morbid state characterized by increased sensitivity of teeth due to loss of their uppermost covering, causing increased sensation to cold and hot things

tooth worm diseases of respiratory syste.def: A morbid state characterized by presence of small worms in teeth

tracheitis.def: Inflammation of trachea; a morbid state characterized by mild fever and pain, pulsation in interscapular region and hoarseness of voice

tracheal ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by fishy breath with little expectoration

intermittent trembling of trachea.def: A morbid state characterized by shaking of voice at intervals during conversation

continuous trembling of trachea.def: A morbid state characterized by shaky voice throughout conversation

roughness of trachea.def: A morbid state usually caused by dust and smoke and characterized by cough

weakness of lungs standard terminologies.def: A morbid state characterized by cough with little expectoration, loss of appetite, loss of body weight, noisy breathing, puffy eyes, lethargy, loose motions, etc. Description

dyspnoea.def: A morbid state characterized by difficulty in breathing due to narrowing of air passages; this term does not cover Ḍīq al-Tanaffus mentioned under signs and symptoms

orthopnoea.def: A morbid state in which patient can breath only in sitting posture with raised head

cardiac asthma.def: Severe shortness of breath, characterized by difficulty in breathing due to congestion of lung arteries

bronchial asthma.def: Shortness of breath, characterized by difficulty in breathing due to narrowing of bronchioles

catarrhal bronchial asthma.def: Shortness of breath due to catarrh, characterized by sudden aggravation of dyspnoea along with postnasal drip, headache and heaviness of head

phlegmatic bronchial asthma.def: Shortness of breath due to phlegmatic matter, characterized by gradual aggravation of dyspnoea, noisy breathing, heaviness of chest and thick sputum

bronchial asthma due to vapours.def: Shortness of breath due to vapours arising from heart, characterized by dyspnoea with dry cough, increased thirst and palpitation

bronchial asthma due to gases.def: Shortness of breath due to gases, characterized by dyspnoea without heaviness of chest, dry cough and intensification of symptoms after taking flatulent diets Description

bronchial asthma due to paralysis of mus.def: Shortness of breath due to paralysis of muscles, characterized by breathlessness in the recumbent position

bronchial asthma due to dryness in the l.def: Shortness of breath due to predominance of dryness in the lungs, characterized by dyspnoea, dry cough, increased thirst, high- pitched voice and relief with usage of moistness-producing things

bronchial asthma due to inflammation.def: Shortness of breath due to inflammatory conditions of lung, characterized by dyspnoea along with the clinical features of causative disease

bronchial asthma due to increased heat o.def: Shortness of breath due to increased heat of lungs, characterized by dyspnoea along with other features of increased heat

bronchial asthma due to cold.def: Shortness of breath due to increased coldness of lungs, occurring after exposure to cold environment and intake of things of cold temperament, characterized by dyspnoea and dry cough

cough.def: Reflex action of body to get rid of some irritative substance from the respiratory air passage

acute catarrhal cough standard terminolo.def: Cough due to acute catarrh, characterized by coughing which becomes worst at night along with irritation of throat, stuffy nose, etc. Description

chronic catarrhal cough.def: Cough due to chronic catarrh, occurring after cold, characterized by severe cough with viscid sputum

cough due to moistness on the lungs.def: Cough due to predominance of moistness in the lungs, usually occurring during old age and in persons having moist temperament, characterized by cough with noisy breathing

cough due to dryness on the lungs.def: Cough due to predominance of dryness in the lungs, characterized by coughing which becomes worse during physical exertion, hunger and after intake of things of dry temperament and subsides during rest and after usage of

epidemic cough.def: Epidemic form of disease characterized by severe cough, decreased thirst, loss of appetite and puffiness of face and eyes

children’s cough.def: A morbid state caused by predominance of moistness, dryness of trachea or dust and smoke, characterized by cough which may be productive or nonproductive

eruptions in lungs.def: A morbid state characterized by fast and shallow breathing, heaviness of chest, feeling of heat in the chest, and body without fever

loud stridor.def: Noisy breathing during sleep, caused by excess of secretions in the lungs

haemoptysis.def: Coughing up of blood, characterized by expectoration of blood or blood-stained sputum Description

pneumonia.def: Inflammation of lungs, characterized by continuous high-grade fever, severe dyspnoea, cough, thirst, heaviness in anterior part of chest, pain in chest and interscapular area, etc.

sanguineous pneumonia.def: Inflammation of lungs due to sanguine, characterized by severe dyspnoea, cough, redness of tongue, eyes and cheeks, throbbing pain of chest, drowsiness and stickiness in mouth

bilious pneumonia.def: Inflammation of lungs due to yellow bile, characterized by moderate dyspnoea, dry cough, fever, intense thirst, dryness of tongue, feeling of heat in chest and yellowish colour of urine

phlegmatic pneumonia.def: Inflammation of lungs due to phlegm, characterized by dyspnoea, cough, heaviness in chest and excessive salivation

infantile pneumonia.def: Inflammation of lungs of children, characterized by breathlessness, fever, thirst and dryness of mouth

phthisis/ tuberculosis.def: Ulceration of lungs leading to emaciation of body, characterized by ulceration of lungs, haemoptysis, continuous mild fever with tendency to increase after food intake and during night, and emaciation

condition similar to phthisis standard t.def: A morbid state characterized by severe cough with expectoration and breathlessness without ulceration of lungs Description

pyoptysis.def: Expectoration of pus; a morbid state caused by ulcers of lungs, larynx, pharynx, trachea or oesophagus and infiltration of sharp erosive humours into lungs

pleuritis.def: Inflammation in the right or left side of chest, a morbid state caused by inflammation of pleural membranes

pain of side of chest due to inflammatio.def: A morbid state characterized by pain of side of chest, fever and cough
A morbid state characterized by fever, dry cough in the initial stages, breathlessness and pain

pain of side of chest due to sanguineous.def: A morbid state characterized by continuous high-grade fever, pain of side of chest with burning sensation, cough with reddish sputum, severe breathlessness, etc.

pain of side of chest due to bilious inf.def: A morbid state characterized by severe pain of side of chest with intense burning sensation, high-grade fever, cough with yellowish sputum, intense thirst, delirium, etc.

pain of side of chest due to phlegmatic.def: A morbid state characterized by mild fever, pain of side of chest with heaviness, headache, continuous lacrimation, cough with whitish sputum, puffiness of face, etc. Description

pain of side of chest due to melancholic.def: A morbid state characterized by pain of side of chest, dry cough in initial stages and blackish expectoration in later stages, fever, blackish discoloration of face, dryness of mouth, roughness of tongue, etc.

pain of side of chest due to inflammatio.def: A morbid state characterized by cough without expectoration, and pain on touching the affected area

false pleurodynia.def: Pain of side of chest due to accumulation of gases; a morbid state characterized by pain of side of chest due to accumulation of gases between pleural membranes

epidemic pleurodynia.def: Epidemic of pain of side of chest; a morbid state characterized by pain of side of chest, mild fever, cough, fetid breath and syncope

inflammation of anterior part of mediast.def: A morbid state characterized by continuous fever, restlessness, pain of anterior part of chest, breathlessness and inability to sleep on back and sides

inflammation of posterior part of medias.def: A morbid state characterized by cough, restlessness, severe piercing pain in the interscapular area and inability of patient to sleep on the back

diaphragmitis standard terminologies on.def: Inflammation of the diaphragm; a morbid state characterized by high-grade fever, dry cough, burning sensation, intense thirst, right upper quadrant pain, etc. Description

intercostal pain.def: Inflammation of posterior part of diaphragm (false ribs); a morbid state characterized by pain due to inflammation of posterior part of diaphragm which is attached to false ribs

restricted breathing.def: Restricted breathing due to predominance of coldness in chest; a morbid state characterized by shortness of breath with relief in sitting position, and tightened chest muscles

empyema diseases of heart.def: Collection of pus in the pleural cavity; a morbid state in which pus accumulates in the area between lungs and inner surface of chest wall, characterized by mild fever, heaviness of chest, pain, breathlessness and dry or

pain of heart.def: A morbid state caused by morbid temperament of heart, inflammation or humoural imbalance

palpitation.def: Feeling of trembling of heart; a morbid condition characterized by increased heart beat which is noticed by patient

palpitaton due to hot morbid temperament.def: Trembling of heart due to hot morbid temperament of heart; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, restlessness, thirst, excessive anger and reddish urine Description

sanguineous palpitation.def: Sanguineous trembling of heart; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, swift and large pulse, distended vessels, lethargy, etc.

bilious palpitation.def: Bilious trembling of heart; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, rapid and hard pulse, restlessness, sleeplessness, intense thirst, bitterness and dryness of mouth and yellowish discoloration of face

palpitation due to cold morbid temperame.def: Trembling of heart due to cold morbid temperament of heart; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, fear, cowardice, strong emotions, sleepiness, whitish urine, etc.

phlegmatic palpitation.def: Phlegmatic trembling of heart; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, fear, sinking feeling, breathlessness, soft pulse and whitish urine

melancholic palpitation.def: Melancholic trembling of heart; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, grief and sorrow, restlessness, altered thoughts and hallucinations

palpitation due to gases.def: Trembling of heart due to gases; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, excessive belching and other features of accumulation of gases

palpitation due to vapours standard term.def: Trembling of heart due to vapours; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, sour belching, burning sensation of eyes and feeling of ascending vapours from umbilicus to throat Description

palpitation due to obstruction.def: Trembling of heart due to obstruction; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, variation in volume and strength of pulse without features of congestion

palpitation due to weak- ness of heart.def: Trembling of heart due to weakness of heart; a morbid state characterized by trembling of heart, weak pulse and general weakness

palpitation due to increased sensitivity.def: Trembling of heart due to increased sensitivity of heart; a morbid state characterized by onset of trembling of heart due to insignificant factors and psychological factors

palpitation due to secondary causes.def: Trembling of heart due to secondary causes; a morbid state caused by the involvement of stomach, lungs or intestinal worms

syncope.def: Fainting; a morbid state characterized by temporary loss of consciousness, pale face, cold extremities and weak pulse due to weakness of heart; this term does not cover Subāt (prolonged state of deep sleep) mentioned und

fainting due to excessive evacuation.def: Fainting due to excessive evacuation of fluids from body

fainting due to deranged temperament.def: Fainting due to deranged temperament of body; a morbid state caused by hot or cold morbid temperament of the body Description

fainting due to excessive physical exert.def: Fainting due to excessive physical exertion and predominance of dryness in the body

fainting due to involve- ment of stomach.def: A morbid state preceded by nausea, yawning and restlessness

loss of vitality standard terminologies.def: A morbid state characterized by sudden loss of vitality and difficult body movements due to congestion of fluids, accumulation of thick humours in stomach and vessels, acute fevers and during epidemics Description

carditis.def: Inflammation of the heart; a morbid state, usually acute in nature, characterized by severe palpitation, irregular pulse, severe burning sensation and heaviness in body and around respiratory organs, and repeated faintin

inflammation of atria.def: A morbid state occurring after acute diseases and chronic fevers characterized by heaviness at cardiac end of stomach and lungs, pale face, frequent fainting, puffy swollen eyelids, breathlessness, etc.

pericarditis.def: Inflammation of outer covering of heart; a morbid state characterized by fainting and loss of vitality after jerky movements of pulse

pericardial effusion / pericardial conge.def: Collection of fluids in covering of heart; a morbid state characterized by slow irregular pulse, abnormal respiration and nasal flaring

sensation of squeezing of the heart.def: A morbid state caused by infiltration of melancholic matter into heart and characterized by sensation of squeezing of heart, partial loss of consciousness and excessive salivation

sensation of scratching of heart.def: A morbid state characterized by sensation of scratching of heart, severe pain accompanied by brief loss of consciousness and excessive perspiration

sensation of bouncing of heart.def: A morbid state in which the patient feels that the heart is trying to come out of chest due to hot morbid temperament of heart Description

sensation of floating of heart.def: A morbid state in which the patient feels that the heart is floating due to involvement of liver and stomach

sensation of upward pulling of heart.def: A morbid state caused by burnt humours, characterized by sensation of upward pulling of heart, leading to fainting, altered sensorium and palpitation

sensation of downward pulling of heart d.def: A morbid state caused by accumulation of bad humours in the liver leading to sensation of downward pulling of heart, partial fainting and mild pain in the heart

narrowing of lumen of oesophagus.def: A morbid state characterized by difficulty in swallowing liquids

oesophageal injury.def: Loss of structural integrity in oesophagus; a morbid state caused by rupture of vessels due to congestion or trauma and characterized by interscapular pain and vomiting of blood

oesophageal ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by retrosternal pain and burning sensation after having spicy, salty and sour food items

itching in oesophagus standard terminolo.def: A morbid state caused by reflux of sharp humours accumulated in stomach, characterized by frequent throat clearing and irritating cough Description

oesophagitis.def: Inflammation of oesophagus; a morbid state characterized by interscapular pain during swallowing

inflammation of oesopha- gus due to invo.def: A morbid state characterized by interscapular pain especially during swallowing, high-grade fever and intense thirst along with specific features of predominance of sanguine or yellow bile

inflammation of oesoph- agus due to invo.def: A morbid state characterized by interscapular pain and heaviness without fever and thirst

morbid temperament of stomach.def: Derangement of temperament of stomach; a morbid state with or without involvement of matter

morbid temperament of stomach without in.def: Derangement of temperament of stomach without involvement of matter; a morbid state characterized by pain without heaviness of stomach, transparent urine of thin consistency, etc.

morbid temperament of stomach with invol.def: Derangement of temperament of stomach with involvement of matter; a morbid state characterized by pain and heaviness in stomach, translucent urine of thick consistency, etc. Description

gastralgia.def: Pain in stomach; a morbid state caused by inflammatory conditions of stomach, flatulence, weakness of stomach, intake of bad quality food materials, etc.

gastralgia due to flatulence.def: Pain in stomach due to flatulence; a morbid state characterized by pain, flatulence, belching, hiccough and borborygmi

gastralgia due to hot morbid temperament.def: Pain in stomach due to hot morbid temperament; a morbid state characterized by pain and burning sensation in upper part of stomach, dry mouth, etc.

bilious gastralgia.def: Pain in stomach due to predominance of yellow bile; a morbid state characterized by pain in empty stomach along with features of predominance of yellow bile

gastralgia due to cold morbid temperamen.def: Pain in stomach due to cold morbid temperament; a morbid state characterized by pain along with decreased thirst, disturbed digestion, increased appetite and sour belching

phlegmatic gastralgia.def: Pain in stomach due to predominance of phlegm; a morbid state characterized by pain along with features of predominance of phlegm

melancholic gastralgia standard terminol.def: Pain in stomach due to predominance of black bile; a morbid state characterized by pain, increased appetite and flatulence along with features of predominance of black bile Description

gastralgia due to weakness.def: Pain in stomach due to its weakness; a morbid state characterized by pain after having food, which subsides after vomiting

gastric debility.def: A morbid state characterized by interscapular pain, vomiting after intake of food, weak pulse, emaciation, pallor, oedema, etc.

delayed digestion.def: A morbid state in which food remains in the stomach for a longer time in undigested form and is accompanied by heaviness in stomach and sour belching

dyspepsia.def: Indigestion; a morbid state characterized by foul-smelling eructus, burning sensation in epigastrium, nausea and foul-smelling stools

failure of digestion.def: A morbid state characterized by epigastric pain, puffiness on face, belching, nausea and vomiting, hiccough, pallor, etc.

perverted digestion.def: Failure of digestion resulting in abnormal qualitative change in food; a morbid state characterized by heaviness and distension in the stomach, heaviness in the head, pallor, breathlessness, belching, vomiting and diarrh

diarrhoea with vomiting.def: A morbid state due to abnormal qualitative change in the ingested food, characterized by vomiting and diarrhoea Description

bilious diarrhoea with vomiting.def: A morbid state characterized by expulsion of bilious material through vomiting and diarrhoea, intense thirst, restlessness and other features of predominance of yellow bile

phlegmatic diarrhoea with vomiting.def: A morbid state characterized by expulsion of phlegmatic material through vomiting and diarrhoea, sour taste in mouth, excessive salivation, lack of thirst and other features of predominance of phlegm

melancholic diarrhoea with vomiting.def: A morbid state characterized by expulsion of melancholic material through vomiting and diarrhoea, mild vomiting, severe diarrhoea, flatulence, sour belching, etc.

epidemic diarrhoea with vomiting.def: A morbid state characterized by sudden onset of vomiting and diarrhoea, sunken eyes, restlessness, intense thirst, no urine output, fainting, cold extremities, muscular cramps, bluish discoloration of skin, etc.

poor appetite.unani: Ḍu‘f al-Shahwa / Nuqṣān al-Shahwa/ Qilla al-Shahwa
poor appetite.def: A morbid state in which patient has reduced desire to eat

pica / perversion of appetite standard t.def: Desire to eat non-edibles; a morbid state characterized by a powerful desire to eat substances not considered to be food, e.g., coal, soil, etc. Description

deviation of appetite in pregnancy.def: Desire to eat spicy and salty food items

voracious appetite.def: A morbid state characterized by highly increased appetite even in the absence of need from body

food aversion.def: A morbid state in which requirement of food in body increases but stomach has no affinity for food

hunger-induced fainting.def: A morbid state characterized by hunger causing fainting and loss of vitality

polydipsia.def: Excessive thirst; a morbid state caused by morbid temperament of any particular organ or the whole body and external factors, characterized by excessive thirst; this term does not cover Shidda al-‘Aṭash mentioned under s

gastritis.def: Inflammation of gastric mucosa which may be sanguineous, bilious, phlegmatic and melancholic

sanguineous gastritis.def: A morbid state characterized by pain in abdomen, high- grade fever, thirst, red face, and red and rough tongue

bilious gastritis.def: A morbid state characterized by pain, high- grade fever, intense thirst, yellowish tongue and face, and bilious vomiting

phlegmatic gastritis.def: A morbid state characterized by pain, mild fever or no fever, puffiness of face, and whitish tongue Description

melancholic gastritis.def: A morbid state characterized by pain, fever or no fever, decreased thirst, blackish tongue and face, sunken eyes and emaciation

gastric abscess.def: A morbid state characterized by fever with chills and rigors, loss of appetite, aggravation of pain after intake of food

gastric ulcers.def: A morbid state characterized by pain in cardiac end of stomach or near umbilicus aggravating on eating sour and spicy food, burning sensation in stomach, foul-smelling eructus, bad breath, excessive nausea and vomiting,

gastric eruptions.def: A morbid state characterized by interscapular or retrosternal pain on eating sour and spicy food, excessive foul-smelling burps and bitter taste

excessive belching excessive yawning sta.def: A morbid state in which patient emits gases produced excessively in stomach through mouth A morbid state in which patient opens mouth excessively due to vapours accumulating in muscles of jaws and lips Description

excessive pandiculation.def: A morbid state in which the patient stretches the body excessively due to vapours accumulating in body muscles

retention of flatus.def: A morbid state in which gas accumulated in stomach is not released through belching

vomiting.def: A morbid state characterized by expulsion of contents of stomach through mouth; this term does not cover Qay’ mentioned under regimenal therapy

bilious vomiting.def: A morbid state characterized by expulsion of bilious material through vomiting, thirst and bitter taste

melancholic vomiting.def: A morbid state characterized by expulsion of melancholic material through vomiting, absence of thirst, sour taste and flatulence

vomiting associated with disease of orga.def: A morbid state characterized by recurrent episodes of vomiting accompanied by disease of any other organ than stomach, such as brain, liver, gallbladder, spleen or uterus

vomiting during crisis period of disease.def: Vomiting occurring at the turning point of a disease for better or worse

haematemesis.def: Vomiting of blood with bleeding from oesophagus and stomach Description

retching.def: making the sound and action of vomiting without expulsion of contents of stomach

nausea.def: feeling of discomfort in stomach, with desire to vomit

persistent nausea.def: long-lasting feeling of discomfort in stomach, with desire to vomit

hiccup/hiccough.def: Involuntary upward movement of muscles of stomach and diaphragm as a result of irritation or dryness of cardiac end of stomach

hiccup due to pre- dominance of heat in.def: A morbid state characterized by hiccup accompanied by intense thirst and inclination to eat dietary substances of cold temperament

hiccup due to pre- dominance of coldness.def: A morbid state characterized by hiccup accompanied by decreased thirst, inclination to eat dietary substances of hot temperament, and delayed digestion

hiccup due to pre- dominance of yellow b.def: A morbid state characterized by hiccup accompanied by bitter taste and bilious vomiting

hiccup due to predominance of black bile.def: A morbid state characterized by hiccup accompanied by sour taste, burning sensation in stomach and blackish and foul- smelling vomiting

hiccup due to pre- dominance of dryness.def: A morbid state caused by excessive dryness, excessive evacuation, starvation, etc. Description

hiccup due to large quantity of ingested.def: Hiccup due to large quantity of ingested food irritating cardiac end of stomach

hiccup due to irritation of cardiac end.def: A morbid state caused by intake of sour and spicy food, abnormal qualitative change in ingested food, etc.

hiccup due to retention of gases.def: A morbid state characterized by hiccup occurring after indigestion and intake of flatulent diets, belching, flatulence and borborygmi

hiccup due to inflamma- tory condition o.def: A morbid state characterized by hiccup accompanied by clinical features of inflamma- tory diseases of brain, stomach or liver

coagulation of blood in stomach.def: A morbid state characterized by cold sweats, rigors and fainting

coagulation of milk in stomach.def: A morbid state characterized by restlessness, cold sweats, cold extremities, breathlessness, nausea, etc.

atrophy of stomach.def: Thinning of muscles of stomach; a morbid state characterized by excretion of undigested food in the stool, constipation, loss of appetite and emaciation

restlessness due to involvement of stoma.def: A morbid state occurring due to infiltration of disease-causing matter into stomach, characterized by nausea and restlessness Description

trembling of stomach.def: Feeling of trembling movement of stomach; a morbid state usually caused by humours which produce irritation in the stomach

heartburn.def: Pain of cardiac end of stomach; a morbid state characterized by severe pain, cold extremities and fainting

burning sensation of stomach.def: A morbid state caused by intake of foods of different qualities at one time, retention of raw fluids into cardiac end of stomach, or pouring of black bile on it

itching sensation of stomach.def: A morbid state occurring due to presence of irritant humour in stomach or eruptions appearing on internal surface of stomach

itching sensation of stomach due to irri.def: Itching sensation of stomach due to humour causing irritation of stomach; a morbid state characterized by relief in itching after food intake

itching sensation of stomach due to gast.def: Itching sensation of stomach due to eruptions appearing on internal surface of stomach; a morbid state characterized by burning sensation in stomach after food intake

spasm of stomach.def: A morbid state resulting in disturbance of digestive functions of stomach

hardening of stomach.def: A morbid state characterized by excessive salivation, hardness of abdomen on palpation and gastric pain on swallowing

decrease in size of the stomach standard.def: A morbid state characterized by pain in stomach after having large quantity of food Description
